title: Udhaar Ki Zindagi
subTitle: Sitaram refuses to accept his son Vasudev's marriage to Suman. Years later, he eagerly awaits their return from the USA but is left disheartened when his granddaughter Sita turns up alone.

title: 3 Deewarein
subTitle: While filming a documentary in a prison, Chandrika comes across three unique stories and, somewhere in between, finds what her heart has been seeking.

title: Avtaar
subTitle: Avtaar leads a happy life with his wife, Radha, and his sons, Chander and Ramesh. However, consumed by their greed and ambitions, Avtaar's sons betray him but he soon reaches new heights of success.

title: Amrit
subTitle: A widowed man and woman face abuse from their respective children and seek comfort from each other instead.

title: Nishant
subTitle: After his wife Rukmini is abducted by his cruel brother, Vishwam is forced to confront the deep-rooted issues of power and control that plague their village, leading to tragic consequences.

title: Haan Maine Bhi Pyaar Kiya
subTitle: Pooja divorces her husband for being unfaithful and gets a job as secretary to a film star. The two fall in love, before her ex-husband returns and she finds herself confused between the two men.

title: Katha
subTitle: Rajaram, a middle-class clerk, is secretly in love with his neighbour, Sandhya, but is too shy to disclose his love. However, he is taken aback when his smooth-talking friend soon woos Sandhya.

title: Chalta Hai Yaar
subTitle: Frustrated with his wife, Namdev, a businessman, decides to end his life. However, things take a turn when he envisions his dead father who encourages him to rethink his decision.

title: Raja
subTitle: Raju and Madhu are forced apart by the latter's elder brothers, leading to increased distance between the two.

title: Jamai Raja
subTitle: When the wealthy Durgeshwari's daughter falls in love with Raja, a poor boy, she reluctantly agrees to their union. However, she constantly tries to sabotage their relationship, but Raja outwits her.

title: Ghar Ek Mandir
subTitle: Brothers Prem, Vijay and Ravi are happy, but their lives change when Prem gets killed. Ravi must save his family from an evil man, Dharampal, while Vijay is preoccupied with Sapna.

title: Ghar Ek Mandir
subTitle: Brothers Prem, Vijay and Ravi are happy, but their lives change when Prem gets killed. Ravi must save his family from an evil man, Dharampal, while Vijay is preoccupied with Sapna.

title: Geet
subTitle: After losing her ability to sing, Neha, a famous star, relocates to a small village. While she attempts to get back her voice, she encounters Rajesh, who decides to help her.

title: Abhimaan
subTitle: Subir, a singer, encourages his wife, Uma, to pursue a singing career. However, things take a turn when she becomes more popular than him.

title: Jeevan Dhaara
subTitle: Sangeeta, a young woman, decides to sacrifice her dreams and work relentlessly to provide for her family after her father abandons them.

title: Barah Aana
subTitle: Three roommates decide to solve their financial struggles by going down the path of crime and kidnapping people for small ransoms.

title: Jaanwar
subTitle: A criminal changes the course of his life when he decides to raise a baby who has survived a train crash, but chaos ensues when his past begins to haunt him.

title: Sachaa Jhutha
subTitle: After his lookalike, Ranjith, convinces Bhola to impersonate him for money, an innocent Bhola soon finds himself in trouble when the police chase after him for Ranjith's crimes.

title: Annadata
subTitle: When Amba Prasad realises the harsh truth that his relatives just care for his money, he leaves home. Upon reaching a village, he meets Arun and Aarti and his life changes forever.

title: Disco Dancer
subTitle: A slum-dwelling performer finds a new calling as a rising disco star. However, things take an unfortunate turn when an enemy from the past reappears in his life.

title: Khuda Gawah
subTitle: Badshah Khan travels to India to behead the man who killed Benazir's father and win her hand in marriage. He succeeds in his mission but is caught by Ranveer Singh, a jailor.

title: Raj Kumar
subTitle: Rajkumar's mother sets out to oppose his marriage after she finds out that he plans to marry the rival kingdom's princess.

title: Raj Kumar
subTitle: Rajkumar's mother sets out to oppose his marriage after she finds out that he plans to marry the rival kingdom's princess.

title: Road to Sangam
subTitle: A devout Muslim Indian man is tasked with repairing a lorry in order to transport the ashes of Mahatma Gandhi. However, when communal violence strikes, he is left with a troubling dilemma.

title: Bumper Draw
subTitle: Two men form a friendship in the most unlikely situation. Later, when they meet a rich man, they begin to devise a plan that will put an end to their financial difficulties.

title: Ek Chitthi Pyar Bhari
subTitle: A doctor puts out a job posting to recruit a nurse for his clinics in rural India. Unaware of a candidate's dark past, he hires her and eventually falls in love with her.

title: Aavishkar
subTitle: Amar and Mansi's marital life becomes strained when his job in an advertising agency places him in close proximity to beautiful models.

title: Zulmi
subTitle: Raj is hired as a bodyguard for Komal, and the two grow closer to each other over time. However, things get complicated when he comes across Nihal, the man who molested his sister.

title: Do Raaste
subTitle: Navendu looks after his stepmother and half-brothers to fulfil the promise he has made to his father. However, their family falls apart after one of them marries a rich, controlling woman.

title: Aadat Se Majboor
subTitle: Dinanath, a devout Hindu, wishes to get his son Shankar married to Salma, an orphan who lives with them. However, Shankar's childhood sweetheart Neetu returns to his life.

title: Pyar Hi Pyar
subTitle: At an orphanage, Kailashnath identifies Vijay as his biological son and takes him home. Years later, a man named Ashok arrives and claims to be Kailashnath's real son.

title: Mohra
subTitle: After a journalist helps to release him from prison, a man agrees to work as a hitman for her, leading him to entangle with a battle between two drug lords.

title: Blue Mountains
subTitle: Som's mother sees her son's selection for a singing reality show as a second chance to fulfil her own dreams. However, complications arise when he faces a quick defeat.
